summary: Iteration 7 - Comprehensive testing of 4 new features: Forgot Password Flow, Partner Dashboard Enhancements, Destinations Page, and Email Notifications. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: ✓ POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns reset_token for existing user
✓ POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns generic message for non-existent user (security)
✓ Full password reset flow: forgot -> reset -> login with new password works
✓ Old password correctly rejected after reset
✓ GET /api/partners/stats returns 403 for non-partner accounts (correct behavior)
✓ GET /api/partners/stats returns stats for partner accounts
✓ Email notifications logged to db.email_notifications collection
✓ Sign In page has 'Forgot your password?' link to /auth/forgot-password
✓ Submit shows success message with demo reset link
✓ Back to Sign In link works
✓ /auth/reset-password without token shows 'Invalid Reset Link' message
✓ Cards have images, ratings, safety badges (Safe/Caution)
✓ 'View on Map' and 'Plan Trip' links present
✓ SEO: Page title 'Morocco Destinations | MarocSphere Travel Guide'
✓ Partner users see dashboard with real API data
✓ Overview tab shows stats (Total Bookings, Revenue, Rating, Profile Views)
✓ Bookings tab shows booking table with filters
✓ Analytics tab shows Booking Breakdown and Performance Summary
✓ Reviews tab shows rating summary and review list
✓ Quick Stats panel shows Status, Plan, Bookings, Reviews
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Forgot Password flow properly handles security (generic message for non-existent emails)
Reset token expiration (1 hour) implemented correctly
Partner Dashboard fetches real data from /api/partners/me, /api/partners/stats, /api/partners/bookings
Email notifications are MOCKED - logged to db.email_notifications instead of sending real emails
Destinations page has proper SEO with Helmet, meta tags, and JSON-LD schema

test_credentials.note: Admin user is NOT a partner account - /api/partners/stats returns 403 (correct behavior)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test partner accounts during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 tested 4 new features: (1) Forgot Password Flow - /api/auth/forgot-password and /api/auth/reset-password endpoints, frontend pages at /auth/forgot-password and /auth/reset-password. (2) Partner Dashboard - /partner/dashboard now fetches real data from /api/partners/me, /api/partners/stats, /api/partners/bookings. Non-partner users redirected to /partner/register. (3) Destinations Page - /destinations shows 6 destination cards with reviews integration, SEO meta tags. (4) Email Notifications - MOCKED, logged to db.email_notifications collection. All features working correctly.

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Email notifications for partner verification are MOCKED - logged to MongoDB collection db.email_notifications and server logs, no real email sent
